items.summary: Remove the 'Attach PDF' icon button from all Quotations Fund transaction rows in FundsManagement.tsx. This was the initial PDF UI change added in the first PDF integration step.

Delete the `usePdfAttachments` custom React hook file (`frontend/src/hooks/usePdfAttachments.ts`) that wraps IndexedDB operations for storing, retrieving, and deleting PDF files keyed by transaction ID.

Remove all usePdfAttachments hook wiring from FundsManagement.tsx — specifically the savePdf call on file selection, the hasAttachment-based visual indicator (paperclip icon or green checkmark), the 'View' button that opens a PDF in a new tab, and the 'Download' button that triggers a browser file download. The transaction rows must be restored to their pre-PDF state with no PDF-related UI or logic.

Revert any canister ID audit changes made to `vite.config.ts`, `.env`, `.env.production`, and the fallback logic in the canister resolution layer (but NOT `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts` which is immutable). Restore these files to the exact state they were in at v44 — the stable baseline before the canister audit work began in v45.
